name: DeerFlow Ops
postCreateCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && cd deer-flow && pip install -e '.[dev]' && cd frontend && npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install && echo $GITHUB_TOKEN | docker login ghcr.io -u $GITHUB_USER --password-stdin 2>/dev/null || true
postStartCommand: echo '✅ Codespace ready — run: cd deer-flow && make backend (then cd frontend && pnpm dev in a second terminal)'
